chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Bail Application No.S-173 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. 1.For orders on office objections. 2.For hearing of Bail Application. Mr. Abdul Fatah Samo, Advocate along with applicants. Mr. Shafi Muhammad Mahar, Deputy P.G for the State a/w complainant and injured. Date of Hearing & Order: 26-04-2024 O R D E R MUHAMMAD IQBAL KALHORO, J.- Complainant Mumtaz Ali and injured Mst. Jamul, who was injured by applicants particularly co- accused Abdul Rehman, who gave a knife injury on her nose, are present and give no objection to bail of applicants. They have filed affidavits giving no objection to the confirmation of interim pre-arrest bail already granted to the applicants by this Court on the ground that compromise has been reached between them. As the offences are compoundable, therefore, learned DPG has raised no objection. 2. Accordingly, this bail application, in view of above, is allowed and the interim pre-arrest bail earlier granted to the applicants by this Court is hereby confirmed on the same terms and conditions with direction to applicants to cooperate in the investigation and join the trial, as the case may be. The observations made hereinabove are tentative in nature and shall not influence the trial Court while deciding the case on merits. The bail application is accordingly disposed of. JUDGE Ahmad
